title: Blue Canyon Shower Attachment for Bath Taps, Double Tap Shower Hose with Head, Push-On Fitting for Round & Oval Taps Up to 2cm, 1.2M Hose for Hair Washing & Pet Bathing, White
features: INSTANT SHOWER WITHOUT INSTALLATION - Transform your bath into a functional shower space without drilling or plumbing work. This shower attachment for bath taps connects in seconds using a secure push-on fitting, perfect for homes without overhead showers or for washing hair, children, and pets over the bath

DUAL TAP MIXER - Unlike single tap attachments, this tap shower attachment for bath connects to both hot and cold taps simultaneously, letting you create the perfect water temperature. The double connection works with round and oval taps measuring up to 2cm in diameter

VERSATILE 1.2M REACH - The generous 1.2 metre shower hose for bath taps provides excellent flexibility for washing hair over the bath, rinsing children during bath time, or cleaning pets indoors and outdoors. Long enough to reach comfortably while seated or standing at the bath

DURABLE WHITE CONSTRUCTION - Built from quality materials with reinforced connections and a comfortable hand-held spray head. The bathroom fixtures grade design resists daily wear while the white finish complements any bathroom décor

MULTI-PURPOSE BATHROOM SOLUTION - Ideal for households with limited bathroom space, elderly family members, or pets. Use as a shower for bath taps, hair washing station, pet grooming tool, or for rinsing after bathing children. No expensive renovation required
description: Product Description A FULLY MANAGED SUPPLY CHAIN OF HOUSEHOLD RANGES Our home and bathroom accessory ranges are constantly changing to meet and adapt to design trends in; bathroom textiles, bathroom accessories, laundry and storage – providing a full homeware range to our clients. An introduction to Blue Canyon... Luxury By Design Blue Canyon are at the forefront of Bathroom Accessory and Homeware manufacturing and distribution. Having built an enviable supply chain of proven providers during the course of 30 years’ experience in the bathroom accessory industries, Blue Canyon have a global reach in manufacturing that ensures the smoothest of operations and supply. Shower Sets, Heads and Hoses Shower Sets Blue Canyon's range of bathroom accessories ensure the highest quality and finishing combinations to suit any home. Our shower set packs come with wall bracket, fixings, push on connection and are suited to both round or oval shape tap openings. Shower Hoses The shower hoses are available to fit on both single and double taps with either round or oval openings. Perfect for bathrooms without an overhead shower. They can be used to wash hair over the bath, or even the kitchen sink. The double tap connection is great to create a mixer of the water for sinks with separate taps. Perfect solution for washing pets indoors or outdoors. All easy to use, portable and rubber. Shower Heads Shower head attachments from Blue Canyon come with or without hose dependant on the model and have multi-way functions varying from one to 6 way settings. They are easy to connect and made of durable quality material.
